title: The Ope Ope Fruit Deal
description: Pages 7–11 focus on the ope ope fruit deal, keeping the Dressrosa conflict and character roles clear for display.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Trafalgar Law, Luffy, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5 as corazon risks everything to steal the Ope Ope no Mi for Law, turning the flashback into a desperate rescue mission.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Why?! How long have you been able to talk?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Since always.

dialogue.speaker: Trafalgar Law
dialogue.text: Corazon's lie, what is the shocking truth?!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: ...so then you've been lying to Doflamingo this whole time?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I never told him that I became unable to speak.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: He came to that conclusion on his own.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: But...! That's the same as you lying to him, isn't it?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Hey, hey, now hold on...

dialogue.speaker: Corazon
dialogue.text: "Silent"...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Ehh?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: The sounds of the city vanished!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: How...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Everyone's definitely talking, but I don't hear anything!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: You were making a scene, so I put up a wall.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: A "sound- proof wall".

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: From here, we can't hear any sounds happening outside, right?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: And those on the out- side won't be able to hear our voices in here, either.

dialogue.speaker: Corazon
dialogue.text: I am a silent human from the "Nagi Nagi NO mi".

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: You're a devil fruit user?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: What the hell?! You've been totally full of shit!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: "Wait, don't tell me!! Then...you always stumbling around clumsily like an idiot too...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: Yeah... but of course...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: Fufu...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: It's all been an act.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: LIAR!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: Your damn shoulder's on fire!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: Well... I've never been able to get over being clumsy since forever...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: I've always been a klutz...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: Shut up about that already!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: The most Unbe- Lieveable parts are all true though?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: Why did you hide this from all of your friends and comrades?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: Don't think of them as comrades...

dialogue.speaker: Corazon
dialogue.text: My duty... as his younger brother...

dialogue.speaker: Corazon
dialogue.text: is to keep my older brother doffy's "mad-ness" at Bay.

dialogue.speaker: Kyros
dialogue.text: From such a kind-hearted mother and father...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: How they could have given birth to such a monster, I'll never know.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: ...he's not human...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: Help meee _ Uuaaa a4H!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: These children have com- mitted no sins!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: Aim your arrows at me!!:cough}...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: Please!! Spare the children!!

dialogue.speaker: Kyros
dialogue.text: The pain... Father...!! I just want to die already!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: You'll all pay for this!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: BROT- HER...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: I will not die...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: No matter what you do to me, I will sur- VIVE...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: And I will kill you all... one by one...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: Until not a single one of you is left alive!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #41
dialogue.text: That's the way he was born...pure evil... knowing fear of nothing!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #42
dialogue.text: The only ones that know of Duffy's true nature...his madness...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #43
dialogue.text: are we four of his inner circle...

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: And the former [corazon], Vergo.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #44
dialogue.text: vergo?

dialogue.speaker: Donquixote Family
dialogue.text: He's an extremely skilled person who's currently away from the family on a top secret mission.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #45
dialogue.text: Even those close to him in the mission are unaware of the specific details...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #46
dialogue.text: regard- less, he has absolutely nothing to do with you.

dialogue.speaker: Corazon
dialogue.text: Don't become a monster like my brother!!

dialogue.speaker: Corazon
dialogue.text: Get away from here, Law...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #47
dialogue.text: There's no way I'm leaving!! I want to become like him!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #48
dialogue.text: The secret name of "D"...!! There's no doubt about it...

dialogue.speaker: Donquixote Family
dialogue.text: You are a member of the FATED family of D...!!

summary: The Ope Ope Fruit Deal advances the Dressrosa story through Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Trafalgar Law, Luffy, Unknown person #3, with unclear voices kept readable rather than forced into unsafe speaker assignments.
